product_overview: DMS is a web-based Document Management System that digitizes PDF upload, multi-step approvals, and automatic signature stamping for hotel operations. It provides role-based access, admin configuration panels, and an approval workflow engine tailored per document category and branch.
core_goals: Replace paper-based document routing with a tracked, auditable digital workflow
Allow users to upload PDF documents, route them through configurable multi-step approvals, and produce final signed PDFs
Automatically stamp PNG signatures onto PDFs at keyword-detected positions when approvals occur
Provide admin tools to configure users, workflows, keywords, signatures, and absence delegation
Ensure role-based access control and non-repudiable approval audit trails

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users via email and password to create a session and access protected areas.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button to submit -> See redirect to / and dashboard content
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill wrong password -> Click Sign In button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Show summary statistics, recent documents and quick links for authenticated users.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See statistics cards and recent documents list
Navigate to / -> Click a recent document link -> Open /documents/:id and see PDF preview and approval chain
Navigate to / while not authenticated -> See redirect to /login

features.name: Document Upload (3-step wizard)
features.description: Upload a PDF, classify it (category + branch), add notes, and submit to start an approval chain.
user_flows: Navigate to /documents/upload -> Select a PDF file -> Choose a category (e.g., PO, CA) -> Choose a branch -> Add optional notes -> Click Submit for Approval -> See success confirmation and navigate to /documents with new document listed
Navigate to /documents/upload -> Select a file that is not a PDF -> Click Submit for Approval -> See validation error message 'Only PDF files are accepted'
Navigate to /documents/upload -> Select a PDF file larger than 25MB -> Click Submit for Approval -> See validation error message 'File exceeds maximum size (25MB)'

features.name: View Documents (list & filters)
features.description: Browse uploaded documents with filters by category and status and toggle between table and grid views.
user_flows: Navigate to /documents -> Click category filter chips (e.g., PO) -> Select status from dropdown (e.g., PENDING) -> Toggle table/grid view -> See filtered list of documents
Navigate to /documents -> API fails to respond -> See error message 'Unable to load documents' and empty/error state

features.name: Document Detail & Approval
features.description: Inspect a document's PDF, review metadata and approval stepper, and perform approve or reject actions (approvals may stamp signatures).
user_flows: Navigate to /documents -> Click a document name to open /documents/:id -> Review PDF preview in viewer -> Review approval chain sidebar -> Click Approve & Sign -> Fill optional comment -> Click Confirm -> See approval step updated to APPROVED and next step unlocked or document marked APPROVED if last step

Navigate to /documents -> Click a document name to open /documents/:id -> Review PDF preview -> Click Reject -> Fill optional comment -> Click Confirm -> See document status updated to REJECTED and approval chain stopped

Navigate to /documents -> Click a document name to open /documents/:id -> Click Approve & Sign when no signature image or keyword mapping exists -> Click Confirm -> See approval succeed but notification 'Approved without stamp' and signed PDF not updated

features.name: My Approvals (Pending / Completed / Delegated)
features.description: Allow approvers to view and act on approvals assigned to them or delegated to them.
user_flows: Navigate to /approvals -> See Pending tab with assigned approvals -> Click an approval item -> Open /documents/:id -> Take action (Approve or Reject) -> See approval removed from Pending and listed in Completed
Navigate to /approvals -> See Delegated tab -> Click a delegated approval -> Open /documents/:id -> Take action -> See delegated approval recorded with delegated_from_user_id
Navigate to /approvals -> No pending approvals -> See empty state message 'No pending approvals'

features.name: Admin — User Management
features.description: Admins create and manage user accounts, assign roles and branches, and control delegation/ban status.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/users -> Click Create User -> Fill required fields (name, email, role, branch) -> Click Save -> See new user in users list
Navigate to /admin/users -> Click Create User -> Leave required fields blank -> Click Save -> See validation errors for required fields

features.name: Admin — Signature Management
features.description: Admins upload PNG signature images per user used by the auto-stamping module.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/signatures -> Click Upload Signature for a user -> Select a PNG file -> Click Upload -> See signature card updated for that user
Navigate to /admin/signatures -> Click Upload Signature for a user -> Select a non-PNG or oversized file -> Click Upload -> See validation error 'Signature must be a PNG image'

features.name: Admin — Workflow Configuration
features.description: Admins create and edit approval workflows (ordered steps) per document category and branch.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/workflows -> Select a Category + Branch -> Edit workflow steps (add/remove/reorder roles) -> Click Save -> See confirmation and updated workflow list
Navigate to /admin/workflows -> Select a Category + Branch -> Remove required role causing empty workflow -> Click Save -> See validation error 'Workflow must contain at least one step'

features.name: Admin — Keyword Mappings
features.description: Admins map Category + Role to PDF keyword and position hints used to place signatures.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/keywords -> Click Create Mapping -> Select Category -> Select Role -> Fill Keyword and Position Hint -> Click Save -> See mapping listed
Navigate to /admin/keywords -> Click Create Mapping -> Leave Keyword blank -> Click Save -> See validation error 'Keyword is required'

features.name: Admin — Absence Delegation
features.description: Admins set absence for users and assign delegates so approvals are re-routed while a user is absent.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/delegation -> Click Set Absence on a user card -> Choose delegated_to user and set start/end dates -> Click Save -> See delegation active on card and delegated approvals appear in delegate's Approvals Delegated tab
Navigate to /admin/delegation -> Click Set Absence -> Choose an invalid delegate (not a valid user) -> Click Save -> See error 'Selected delegate is not a valid user'

features.name: Settings & Profile
features.description: Users can view and update their profile, branch, and display preferences.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Update display name or branch selector -> Click Save -> See success message and updated profile values
Navigate to /settings -> Enter invalid input in a required field -> Click Save -> See validation error and unchanged profile data

routes.description: Dashboard with statistics and recent documents
Document detail page with PDF preview and approval tracking
View pending, completed, and delegated approvals
Admin panel to manage user signatures
Admin panel to configure approval workflows
Admin panel to set keyword mappings for signature stamping

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: Click Sign In button to submit
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Document Upload
features.description: Upload a new PDF document, categorize it, and submit for approval

features.name: Document Approval
features.description: Approve or reject a document step
